title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
ECIL South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
jsonLd.skills: Docker, Go, REST APIs, JavaScript, Machine Learning, AWS, CI/CD, React
